title: Conduct and Report of Assessment. The Inspectors shall proceed to the
content: 21 establishment and present the Authority to Assess to the applicant agency. A responsible 22 representative of the applicant shall receive and sign a copy of the said Authority. The 23 Assessment shall be conducted in the presence of such representative. 24 25 B. REGULAR ASSESSMENT 26 27
